rationale: Ground truth has no substantive concerns (just LGTM), so both candidates correctly approve and 'recall' is vacuously satisfied. Both did diff-grounded grep verification, but Y's specific line-number citations (api_server.py:754,1017,1157,1248,1286,1329; test_serving_speech.py:2533,2546,2615) check out exactly against the diff hunks, while X's citation of test line numbers (2638,2651,2720) is off by roughly 100 lines and appears fabricated. Y is therefore more precisely grounded despite similar structure and depth.
